use_cases: Creating interactive glass-morphism decorative elements that follow cursor movement on web pages
Adding depth and liquid glass effects to card backgrounds and hero sections
Building modern UI overlays with frosted, translucent visual elements
Enhancing landing pages with ambient cursor-tracking visual effects
Creating premium, polished UI components for SaaS and portfolio sites
ai_summary: A liquid glass effect component using SVG feTurbulence filters and GSAP animations to create a frosted glass element that smoothly follows the cursor. The component features configurable dimensions, border radius, tint opacity, and blur intensity, producing an elegant glass-morphism aesthetic with real-time mouse position tracking and power2.out easing transitions.
